header.title: Radio Group
header.subtitle: A set of mutually exclusive options. Only one item can be selected at a time. Supports keyboard navigation with arrow keys.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: RadioGroup renders a role=radiogroup container. Each RadioItem wraps a hidden input with a custom visual control.

parts.input: Hidden native radio input. Carries focus, keyboard, and form semantics.
parts.box: Circular border rendered as the visual control.
parts.dot: Filled dot that appears when the item is selected.
parts.label: Primary text for the option.
parts.description: Supporting text rendered below the label.

withDescription.title: With descriptions
withDescription.description: Each item can carry a description for additional context.

props.name: HTML name attribute used to group the inputs.
props.onChange: Callback fired with the new value when selection changes.
props.items: Array of RadioItem objects ({ value, label, description?, disabled? }).
props.extendsNote: RadioGroup does not extend HTMLElement props directly. Use native form attributes (name, form) at the input level if needed.
